questions.question: In his prayer, what did Jesus say eternal life is?
options: Knowing the only true God and Jesus Christ whom he sent
questions.answer: Knowing the only true God and Jesus Christ whom he sent

questions.question: Who did Jesus say he was NOT praying for in this prayer?
Jesus prayed that his followers would be taken out of the world.
Sanctify them in your truth. Your _____ is truth.
That they may all be _____; even as you, Father, are in me, and I in you.
